calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing For Plaintiffs Greentree Financial And Bcm Lending Llcs Request For Court Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Tamara M. Leetham, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Greentree Financial Group, Inc. and BCM Lending LLC.
No appearance by the defaulted defendant Amarantus Bioscience Holdings, Inc., a Nevada Corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on May 19, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 6, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 14, 2017.
Breach of Contract is plaintiffs' only remaing cause of action.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Greentree Financial Group, Inc. and BCM Lending LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Amarantus Bioscience Holdings, Inc. a Nevada Corporation, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $1,168,932.00.
(This is comprised of $892,336.00 in favor of plaintiff Greentree Financial Group, Inc. and $276,596.00 in favor of plaintiff BCM Lending LLC.)
Attorney Fees - $10,321.77.
Costs - $722.40, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,179,976.17.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
